sections.paragraph:
Original: ערב ערב

Transliteration: ‛ărâb ‛ărab

Phonetic: ar-awb'

BDB Definition:

  1. steppe-dwellers
    1. the people inhabiting the country east and south of Canaan, the nomadic desert Bedouins
    2. Arabians, Arabs

Origin: from H6150 in the fig. sense of sterility

TWOT entry: 1688a,1688c

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name
